name: mod-engine
author: Tomahawk
description:
Rhino/JS control engine + NexusOS UI for Mindustry V8.

[accent]Core features[]
• [cyan]Home[] — sector status, live core item flow, power balance
• [cyan]Waves[] — force waves, auto-wave, composition preview
• [cyan]World[] — time of day, wind, weather, sector capture tools
• [cyan]Items / Units[] — inject items, spawn units, mod content filters
• [cyan]Player / Weapon[] — pilot stats, stable unit fire-rate & turret tuning
• [cyan]Mining[] — fleet ore assignment (multi-ore stances)
• [cyan]Inspector[] — content browser with pagination (lower PAGE SIZE if laggy)
• [cyan]Builds[] — instant build, structure godmode, mass selection actions
• [cyan]Radius[] — turret/unit range overlays (shield-style non-stacking)
• [cyan]Hotkeys[] — persistent remappable gameplay commands
• [cyan]Console[] — in-game Rhino JS terminal

[accent]Tips[]
• First launch shows a bilingual welcome dialog (EN/RU).
• Inspector lag? Set page size to [green]20–40[].
• Use nav modes: [accent]USUAL[] / [scarlet]SANDBOX[] / ALL.

[gray]JS-only mod. No Java classpath required.[]
